name: Gemxx Corp.
summary: Gemxx Corp., a software development and IT company, focusing on providing customized Web and enterprise client server development solutions. It offers a suite of information management solutions for the healthcare, education, hospitality, and retail sectors. The company was formerly known as Brainybrawn, Inc. and changed its name to Gemxx Corp. in April 2021. Gemxx Corp. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Allentown, Pennsylvania.
